query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN textoExtraido IS NOT NULL AND textoExtraido != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comTexto, SUM(CASE WHEN textoExtraido IS NULL OR textoExtraido = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as semTexto, SUM(CASE WHEN pdfUrl IS NOT NULL AND pdfUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comPdf, SUM(CASE WHEN pdfUrl IS NULL OR pdfUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as semPdf FROM processos;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN textoExtraido IS NOT NULL AND textoExtraido != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comTexto, SUM(CASE WHEN textoExtraido IS NULL OR textoExtraido = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as semTexto, SUM(CASE WHEN pdfUrl IS NOT NULL AND pdfUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comPdf, SUM(CASE WHEN pdfUrl IS NULL OR pdfUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as semPdf FROM processos;
